sentences.arabic: اِجْتَمَعَ قَادَةُ الْعَالَمِ فِي مَدِينَةِ جِنِيف لِمُنَاقَشَةِ قَضَايَا السَّلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Svjetski lideri sastali su se u Ženevi kako bi razgovarali o pitanjima mira.
sentences.translationEn: World leaders met in Geneva to discuss issues of peace.

sentences.arabic: رَكَّزَ الِاجْتِمَاعُ عَلَى إِيجَادِ حُلُولٍ لِلنِّزَاعَاتِ الدَّوْلِيَّةِ الْحَالِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Sastanak se fokusirao na pronalaženje rješenja za trenutne međunarodne sukobe.
sentences.translationEn: The meeting focused on finding solutions to current international conflicts.

sentences.arabic: أَكَّدَ الرُّؤَسَاءُ عَلَى أَهَمِيَّةِ الْحِوَارِ الدُّبْلُومَاسِيِّ بَيْنَ الشُّعُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Predsjednici su naglasili važnost diplomatskog dijaloga među narodima.
sentences.translationEn: The presidents emphasized the importance of diplomatic dialogue between peoples.

sentences.arabic: سَيَسْتَمِرُّ الْمُؤْتَمَرُ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ مُتَتَالِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Konferencija će trajati tri uzastopna dana.
sentences.translationEn: The conference will continue for three consecutive days.

sentences.arabic: يَأْمُلُ الْجَمِيعُ أَنْ تَنْتَهِيَ الْحُرُوبُ وَيَعُمَّ الْأَمْنُ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Svi se nadaju da će ratovi prestati i da će sigurnost zavladati svuda.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone hopes that wars will end and security will prevail everywhere.
